metadata.description: Multiple sessions example for batch replay generation
metadata.author: ACP Bridge Team

session.thought: Let me review the pull request changes for the authentication module.
session.message: Can you review the authentication changes in PR #123?
I'll analyze the authentication module changes and provide feedback on security and code quality.

session.thought: The user is reporting a TypeError in the dashboard component. Let me trace through the error.
session.message: I'm getting "Cannot read properties of undefined" in Dashboard.tsx line 45
session.thought: Line 45 accesses userData.profile - this suggests userData might be undefined. Let me check the data flow.
